message.content:
@startuml
actor Client
participant "RegisterClientUI" as UI
participant "RegisterClientController" as Controller
participant "ApplicationPOT" as AppPOT
participant "app\nApplicationPOT" as App
participant "clientService\nClientService" as ClientService
participant "clientDB\nClientDB" as ClientDB
participant "client\nClient" as ClientObj
participant "user\nUser" as UserObj
participant "Address" as AddressObj
participant "CreditCard" as CreditCardObj
participant "EncrypPassword" as Encrypt
participant "EmailSender" as Email
participant "DataHandler" as Data

Client -> UI: 1 Engages the register feature/button
UI -> UI: 2 Asks for all the information required\nfor the register (i.e. name,nif,email,password,latitude,longitude,altitude,\nstreetName,doorNumber,postalCode,locality,country,creditCardNr,validityDate,CCV)
Client -> UI: 3 Fills all the information required
UI -> Client: 4 Presents the data and asks for a confirmation
Client -> UI: 5 Confirms
UI -> Controller: 6 registerNewClient(name,nif,email,password,latitude,longitude,altitude,streetName,\ndoorNumber,postalCode,locality,country,creditCardNr,validityDate,CCV)
Controller -> ClientService: 7 create()
ClientService -> ClientDB: 8 create()
ClientService -> ClientService: 9 validateInput(name,nif,email,password,latitude,longitude,altitude,streetName,\ndoorNumber,postalCode,locality,country,creditCardNr,validityDate,CCV)

alt if all the information given as input has a valid format
    Controller -> ClientObj: 10 newClient(name,nif,email,password,latitude,longitude,altitude,streetName,\ndoorNumber,postalCode,locality,country,creditCardNr,validityDate,CCV)
    ClientObj -> ClientObj: 11 create(name,nif,email,password,latitude,longitude,altitude,streetName,\ndoorNumber,postalCode,locality,country,creditCardNr,validityDate,CCV)
    ClientObj -> UserObj: 12 create(email,password,nif,name)
    UserObj -> Encrypt: 13 encrypPasswordMD5(password)
    ClientObj -> AddressObj: 14 create(latitude,longitude,altitude,streetName,doorNumber,postalCode,locality,country)
    ClientObj -> CreditCardObj: 15 create(creditCardNr,validityDate,CCV)
    Controller -> ClientService: 16 registerNewClient(client)
    ClientService -> ClientService: 17 addClientToDB(client)
    ref over ClientService\nSD_CONNECTIONS
    ClientService -> Email: 18 sendEmail(email,subject,body)
    UI -> Client: 19 Validates and informs about the success of the operation
else if any information does not have a valid format
    UI -> Client: 20 Informs the User that the operation\nwas not successful
end
@enduml
